release: AEGIS Desktop Theme v1.0.1 Cursor Schema Hotfix
fixes: Use org.gnome.desktop.interface/cursor-theme as the canonical cursor setting on current MATE.
Do not abort before applying the cursor when the MATE key is absent.
Do not report a false alignment failure for an unavailable optional key.
Add --repair-cursor for desktops partially configured by v1.0.0.
Remove generated Python bytecode from the Debian payload.
